notes: 2024 monsoon: heavy rain from ~18 Jun 2024 (DREF MDRBD036); earlier May–Jun spell also affected NE; coords ~Sylhet city.
2022 Pakistan mega-flood; Sindh/Balochistan worst hit; Aug 2022 peak Indus plain inundation; Dadu division among heavily flooded districts.

region: Rio Grande do Sul (Porto Alegre / Guaíba)
notes: Apr–May 2024 RS hydrometeorologic disaster; Guaíba record levels; widespread metro inundation (Canoas, Eldorado do Sul, etc.).
Storm Daniel rainfall; Abu Mansour / Derna dam failures 10–11 Sep 2023; catastrophic urban flood wave.
Cyclone Bernd Jul 2021; record Ahr discharge; GEER reconnaissance bridges ~50.54N 7.10–7.12E.
Great Vermont flood 10–11 Jul 2023; Montpelier Winooski crest morning 11 Jul (NWS BTV summary).
29 Oct 2024 DANA flash floods; extreme rainfall western Valencia province; high casualties (see 2024 Spanish floods).
20 Jul 2021 record hourly rainfall; urban and tunnel flooding in central Henan.
Feb–Mar 2022 East Australia floods; Lismore CBD exceeded 2017 flood levels; major EO flood extent studies.
Storm Babet Oct 2023; severe riverine flooding across eastern England; Don catchment high flows.
